# Push Up EMOM 10 Min

- Domain: `bodyweight`
- Session Duration: `10 min`
- Precedence: `complementary`
- Frequency: `2-4x/week`
- Format: `EMOM`
- Equipment: `none`

## Summary

Progressive push-up EMOM built around a sustainable rep target that you can repeat every minute for 10 minutes.

## Work

- Pick a push-up number you can complete every minute on the minute for 10 minutes.
- Example: 5 push-ups per minute for 10 minutes = 50 total push-ups.

## Notes

- Try to increase the rep target every few weeks.
- Repeat this workout consistently 2-4 times per week.
